title: Calendar Widget doesn't show accurate time frame in Week view
excerpt: I’m planning an event and using the Calendar widget on an dashboard to layout the sessions for the event. Each item has a start date and time, but when I look at the events in the week view on the calendar, the time of e…

posts.author: cjmcqueen (Chris McQueen)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m planning an event and using the Calendar widget on an dashboard to layout the sessions for the event. Each item has a start date and time, but when I look at the events in the week view on the calendar, the time of every event appears to be 30 mins. If I create a new event, I can specify that it’s 90 minutes, but it appears as 30 minutes on the calendar. I’m not sure if this is a bug or a feature request, but I would love if the calendar view accurate depicted the time of events.

posts.author: snaguib3 (Sara Naguib)
posts.cookedHtml: same problem here. was this issue resolved?
